name: bitaxe-stabiliser
description: Web-based Bitaxe monitoring and control application. Choose a temperature and app will attempt to keep your bitaxe at that temperature by adjusting the asic voltage & frequency

scripts.build: tsc && npm run build:react && npm run postbuild
scripts.postbuild: cp src/static/Bitaxe.png dist/client/ && cp src/static/favicon.ico dist/client/
scripts.release: npm run docker:build && npm run docker:push && git push --follow-tags && gh release create v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") --generate-notes
scripts.docker:push: docker push pmcochrane/bitaxe-stabiliser:$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && docker push pmcochrane/bitaxe-stabiliser:latest
